scaffolding_policy: F3 anti-patterns, F4 checklist, F5 examples get Day-1 scaffolds (ToC only). Incremental append from every other file as written. Week 3 dedupe/polish.

tasks.acceptance: OTel 1.x + W3C Trace Context L1/L2 + W3C Baggage + ISO/IEC 25010 indirect mapping (Analysability/Accountability/Faultlessness) + OSI boundary decision (L1/L2/L5/L6 explicit out-of-scope) + NTP/clock sync section documented with primary sources cited
4 Layers × 4 Boundaries × 7 Signals (112 cells) with explicit N/A markers for invalid combinations; cross-references to each layer/boundary/signal file
Router definition + 'When to use' + 'When NOT to use' + Out-of-scope (external tools only, no future oma-X names) + Integrations with OMA ecosystem + Versioning & deprecation policy sections
7-step protocol following oma-search pattern: Parse → Classify → Route → Collect → Score → Present + references to matrix.md
Intent categories (setup/migrate/investigate/alert/trace/tune/route) with keyword triggers (Korean + English) and category routing
MRA (Minimum Required Attributes) list + 6-dimension narrowing flow (code/service/layer/host/region/infra) + 3 walkthrough scenarios + vendor-specific query examples
Pipeline self-health (Collector otelcol_* metrics) + Clock skew/NTP discipline + Cardinality guardrails (labels ≤ N) + Retention matrix (per-signal raw/aggregated/archive)
Payload size table (IPv4 1472 / IPv6 1452 / VPN 1432 / UDS 8192 / loopback 16K) + fragmentation risks + PMTUD verification (`ping -M do`) + Wireshark guide
Decision tree gRPC 4317 vs HTTP 4318 (browser/proxy/k8s/firewall axes) + tuning (max_recv_msg_size, memory_limiter, batch, sending_queue, exponential backoff)
Two-tier k8s default (DaemonSet + Deployment) + Fargate/Cloud Run sidecar exception + containerd/CRI-O runtime metrics + OTel Operator v1beta1 4 modes
Tail-based (100% error + 100% cost>$0.50 + 5-10% tail) + cost-aware + tenant-aware; routing_connector (alpha) caveat

Category taxonomy (OSS full-stack / commercial SaaS / high-cardinality / profiling / SIEM / FinOps / feature-flags / log-pipeline / TSDB) + 2-5 example vendors per category with `as-of 2026-Q2` timestamp + feature micro-matrix + How to choose + Delegation target. NO standalone vendor registry. CNCF landscape referenced as authoritative
